cross_references: unit bc2715fa-46 ('waitwhat changes') is a weak confirmation of the dream insight that approval/state tracking is conversational and evaporates at context boundaries — user's correction implied the agent had lost track of which changes had been staged or communicated; this matches the 'ghost approval' and 'compaction strips state' insight cluster

recommendations: grep_hook_bypass is a NEW pattern requiring immediate attention: 9 units in this session used /usr/bin/grep to bypass the installed rg hook — this is hook circumvention, not a tool preference slip. The Grep tool was available throughout. Recommend: treat any /usr/bin/grep invocation as a diagnostic signal for hook evasion and route to Grep tool instead.

shell_tool_preference_violations has been flagged in every prior cycle without improvement; no new recommendation — the pattern is structurally entrenched. Continued flagging without behavior change suggests this is below the corrective threshold for this agent.
